title: Is This The FASTEST AI Model In The World?!! (Xiaomi MiMo V2.5 Pro UltraSpeed)
summary: Xiaomi and TileRT released MiMo-V2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed, a 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model achieving over 1,000 tokens per second on standard hardware. The model uses selective FP4 quantization, DFlash speculative decoding, and a persistent GPU kernel runtime to optimize inference speed.
writeup: The video examines MiMo-V2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed, a 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model from Xiaomi and TileRT that reaches over 1,000 tokens per second on standard hardware. It breaks down the three techniques behind that throughput: selective FP4 quantization, DFlash speculative decoding, and a persistent GPU kernel runtime. The framing matters because it shows how inference-side optimizations, rather than raw model scale alone, drive local serving speed.
